creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Erik,

thanks for submitting your update for brlcad.
I made a small modification to your patch: I moved the LICENSE line so
that portlint(1) does not complain it is in the wrong section. The
updated patch I used for my tests could be found here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/files/brlcad.diff

I tested both on amd64 and i386 and it builds fine. However, there
seems to be a small mistake in the pkg-plist as the package does not
deinstall properly as shown at the very end of the following log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/brlcad-7.20.0.log

Could you please have a look at it?

Thanks!
Frederic
